expectations.text: Proposes a focused list of 5-10 concrete checks before generating any code
expectations.evidence: Response.md presents 6-check proposal up front before writing code

expectations.text: Generated tests target the actual routes that exist in the fixture (e.g. /health, /users/{id}, /orders) rather than invented endpoints
expectations.evidence: All 6 tests hit /health, /users/{id}, /orders, /orders/{id} — exact fixture routes

expectations.text: Output uses a Python-native test framework appropriate for FastAPI (pytest + httpx/TestClient or similar) rather than a generic curl script
expectations.evidence: pytest + fastapi.testclient.TestClient + httpx, exactly the canonical FastAPI smoke stack

expectations.text: Marks environment-specific values like base URL or auth tokens with a clear TODO/placeholder rather than hardcoding production values
expectations.evidence: SMOKE_BASE_URL + SMOKE_TOKEN env vars + TODO comment for app import path
